: ノートルームを作成すると、そのルームにアクセスするためのQRコードが発行され: : Creating a note room generates a QR code that grants access to the room. Share the QR code and multiple people can edit the same note in real time, with all changes saved automatically.

アップロードされたファイルは暗号化された状態でサーバーに保存され、一定期間後に自: Uploaded files are stored encrypted on the server and automatically deleted after a set period. All communication is encrypted over HTTPS to protect your data.
アップロードされたファイルは一定期間後に自動的に削除され、運営者が、利用者の指定: Uploaded files are automatically deleted after a set period and will never be shared with third parties beyond those designated by the user. Files shared via FS!QR's QR code feature are encrypted with AES-256 in the user's browser before being transmitted to and stored on the server, meaning no third party — including the operator — can decrypt the contents. Group room and note room content is stored on the server without encryption.

FS!QRは、QRコードを使ってブラウザだけでデータをやり取りできる無料ファイル: FS!QR is a free file-sharing service that lets you exchange data in your browser using QR codes. File sharing, note sharing, and group sharing are all available directly from your browser.
共有URLやQRコード、ルームID、パスワードを利用して、必要な相手に一時的に共: Share temporarily with specific recipients using a share URL, QR code, room ID, and password.
QRコード共有のファイルはブラウザ上でAES-256暗号化してからサーバーに保存: Files shared via QR code are encrypted with AES-256 in your browser before being stored on the server. Group room files and note text are stored on the server without encryption. All features use HTTPS, and data is automatically deleted after the selected retention period.

Files shared via QR code are encrypted with AES-256 in your browser before being stored on the server. Group room files and note text are stored on the server without encryption. All communications use HTTPS, and each piece of data is automatically deleted after the selected retention period.
